alkylation reagent: alkylation with 10 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 30 min in the dark
cleavage agent: using sequencing-grade trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)
instrument: an LTQ-Orbitrap Velos Pro hybrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: Electrospray ionization (ESI) was performed using a Nano-bore stainless steel emitter
labeling: the proteomic functional analysis of all the detected proteins from AF was carried out
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM 1,4-dithiothreitol (DTT) at 56 °C for 1 h
